---
title: "Session 04: Advanced Pandas"
categories: [Pandas, Aggregating, Merging]
image_path: "/img/python/04"
---

## Importing the data

### Importing `orders.csv` file

```python
df_orders = pd.read_csv('../data/raw/orders.csv')

print(df_orders.columns)
print(df_orders.shape)
df_orders.head()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd
df_orders = pd.read_csv("../../lab/python/data/raw/orders.csv")
print(df_orders.columns)
print(df_orders.shape)
df_orders.head()
```


### Importing `order_products_train .csv` file

```python
# Reading data
df_orders_products_train = pd.read_csv('../data/raw/order_products_train.csv')
print(df_orders_products_train.columns)
print(df_orders_products_train.shape)
df_orders_products_train.head()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd

df_orders_products_train = pd.read_csv("../../lab/python/data/raw/order_products_train.csv")
print(df_orders_products_train.columns)
print(df_orders_products_train.shape)
df_orders.head()
```


### Importing `products.csv` file

```python
df_products = pd.read_csv("../data/raw/products.csv")
df_products.head()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
df_products = pd.read_csv("../../lab/python/data/raw/products.csv")
print(df_products.columns)
print(df_products.shape)
df_products.head()
```


### Importing `departments_t.csv`

```python
df_departments = pd.read_csv('../data/processed/departments_t.csv')
print(df_departments.columns)
print(df_departments.shape)
df_departments.head()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
df_departments = pd.read_csv("../../lab/python/data/processed/departments_t.csv")
print(df_departments.columns)
print(df_departments.shape)
df_departments.head()
```


### Importing `aisles.csv`


```python
df_aisles = pd.read_csv('../data/raw/aisles.csv')
print(df_aisles.columns)
print(df_aisles.shape)
df_aisles.head()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
df_products = pd.read_csv("../../lab/python/data/raw/aisles.csv")
df_products.head()
```




<!-- ::: {.callout-important}
Pay attention to the folder: processeed. Here we changed the location
::: -->
## Data Source extra Information


::: {.callout-important}
[Here](https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/psparks/instacart-market-basket-analysis/data) you can find Instacart related info, data and many more
:::
